QUICK START GUIDE - Project RAGO

Welcome to RAGO! This guide will help you get up and running in under 5 minutes.

PREREQUISITES
- Go 1.21 or later
- Docker and Docker Compose
- PostgreSQL 15+
- Qdrant (for vector storage)

STEP 1: CLONE THE REPOSITORY
  git clone https://github.com/whoangel/rago.git
  cd rago

STEP 2: SET UP ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES
  cp .env.example .env
  # Edit .env with your configuration

STEP 3: START DEPENDENCIES
  docker compose up -d postgres qdrant

STEP 4: RUN MIGRATIONS
  go run cmd/server/main.go
  # AutoMigrate runs automatically on startup

STEP 5: START THE SERVER
  go run cmd/server/main.go
  # Server starts on http://localhost:8080

COMMON ISSUES
- Database connection errors: Check your DATABASE_URL in .env
- Qdrant errors: Ensure Qdrant is running and accessible
- Port conflicts: Change PORT in .env if 8080 is in use

That's it! You're ready to use RAGO.
